hero.subtitle: We provide reliable, high-quality solutions for your digital needs.

software.subtitle: We simplify digitalization so you can focus on your core business. Habaka was born from a conviction: every craftsman, merchant, or association deserves a professional online presence, without the technical hassles. That's why we offer personalized support, custom web solutions, and a reliable service to bring your digital project to life.

redesign.title: Website redesign
redesign.desc: Modernize your digital presence without losing your achievements.

maintenance.subtitle: Your business is evolving, and so is your website. More than just a provider, we are your long-term partner. We provide technical maintenance for your site and stay by your side to advise you and meet your needs.

updates.title: Regular updates
updates.desc: We ensure your systems stay at the forefront of technology and security.

support.title: Responsive support
support.desc: A question? A need? Our technical team will answer you as soon as possible.

reports.title: Simplified reports
reports.desc: Understand the health of your infrastructure with clear, actionable reports.

advice.title: Proactive advice
advice.desc: We anticipate your needs to optimize your tools even before you ask.

hosting.subtitle: Protect and centralize files essential to your business. Enjoy a robust infrastructure with data hosted in Canada or locally for complete sovereignty.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Habaka
whyUs.subtitle: We believe in a digital world that is fast, stable, and incredibly simple to manage.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: No more technical headaches! We manage everything, from design to launch, with a clear and intuitive process. We remove the noise so you can focus on what matters most.

tailored.title: Tailored Solution
tailored.desc: We don't offer a one-size-fits-all approach. Each solution is specifically designed to meet the unique goals of your business or association.

support.title: Proximity & Support
support.desc: Forget impersonal platforms. You have access to a dedicated team that understands your needs and guides you at every step.

stability.title: Stability
stability.desc: Your project is in good hands. Enjoy a robust and secure infrastructure for an uninterrupted online presence.

responsible.title: Responsible Choice
responsible.desc: Opt for an ecological and high-performance solution. Thanks to our servers integrating upcycled components, you benefit from affordable costs while reducing your environmental footprint. A win-win approach for your budget and the planet.

ctaBox.title: Ready to elevate your project?
ctaBox.subtitle: We are here to help you bring your vision to life.

contact.subtitle: We’re here to help you turn your ideas into reality. Reach out and let's start a conversation about your next project.
